titleStmt.title: SII 25.196: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 196. (A.R. No. 196 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantarapurīśvara temple.

This record refers to the gift of land to the tānattar of the temple of Śāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by those who were in-charge of the village duties (grāma-kārya), for the prosperity of the king Ulaguḍaiya-perumāḷ and for the victory of the prince Iruṅgōḷar. Also refers to the provision made for the food-offerings to the goddess Tirukāmakkōṭṭamuḍaiya-periyanāchchiyār, set up by prince Purōśaikkuḍaiyār of Kulōttuṅgaśōḻanallūr. This was attested by a number of signatories.
Boundaries of the gift land are specified at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrī rājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 vatu
nāḷ 2 100 10 4l śrīcuttavalliccaturvvetimaṅ
kalattukku kumpanāyaṟṟu mutal grāmakāriyañ
ceykiṟa kūṭṭap perumakkaḷ Eḻuttu . Ucāt
tāṉamāṉa keraḷakulācaṉic caturvvetimaṅ
kalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiyār
koyilt tāṉattār kaṇṭu Ulakuṭaiya peru
māḷ tirumeṉi kaliyāṇa tirumeṉiyākavum
piḷḷai Iruṅkoḷaṟkku vicaiyāṟtamākavum pi
ḷḷai purocaikkuṭaiyār Ikkoyil Eḻun
taruḷuvitta tirukkāmakoṭṭamuṭaiya periya nā
cciyārkku tiruvamutupaṭikkuṭalākat tirunāmattuk
kāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyumākak kuṭutta nila
m piṭākai kulottuṅka coḻa nallūr tiruvaraṅ
kavatikku meṟku Irāca rāca vāykkālukkut teṟku Ai
ñcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcatirattu kiḻakkaṭaiya ni
lam Orumāvum nikki Itaṉ meṟku komaṭattu paṭ
ṭi kaṇapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ pakkal Irupattoṉṟāvatu pa
cāṉap pokattuṭaṉ vilaikoṇṭu Iṭṭa nilam O
rumāvum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcatirattuṇṭat
tu meṟkaṭaiya nilam Oru māmukkāṇi muntirikai
Itil teṉkiḻakkuccār nilamkāṇi Araikkā
ṇi nikki komaṭattu tevavarata paṭṭaṉ paṭṭikaṇapaṭṭa
ṉ pakkal pacāṉap pokattuṭaṉ vilaiko
ṇṭu Iṭṭa nilam mākāṇi Aṭai
kkāṇi muntirikaiyum Āka Uḷpa
ṭi nilam Iraṇṭumākkāṇi Araikkā
ṇi muntirikaiṉāl virivunilam Araiye
nāṉ māvaraiye Araikkāṇi Innilam
Araiye nāṉmāvaraiye Araikkāṇi
yum Innāḷ mutal cantirātittavarai kāṇiyum
Iṟaiyiliyumākattirukkaimalarile niraṭṭikku
ṭuttom Innilam Irupattoṉṉāvatu muta
l muṉpu Iṭṭataram tavirttup paṉiraṇṭāntaratti
le mutalkoṇṭu Inta nilattāl vanta kaṭamai
yum niṉaippiṭṭut taṇṭum kuṭimaiyum sa
bhā viṉiyokamum Ūrile Eṟaṭṭukkoṇṭu
Iṟukkakkaṭavatākavum Innilam tirunāmattukkā
ṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyum Ākak kaikkoṇṭu paIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
